app_info.subtitle: View and inspect DXF drawings
app_info.description: Aspicio turns DXF CAD drawings into things ChatGPT can work with: structured facts (units, bounds, layers with the colors actually drawn, entity counts, and the drawing's text content), rendered PNG images, and an interactive in-chat viewer with pan, zoom, layer toggles, and fullscreen. Point it at a drawing URL or paste DXF text to read title blocks and dimension values, check layer structure, and visually inspect floor plans, die-cut layouts, and mechanical parts without leaving the conversation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Parses the drawing and returns computed facts (units, bounds, layers, entity counts, text content); it stores nothing and modifies nothing.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches the user-supplied http(s) DXF URL with guarded GET requests (private networks blocked, size-capped, rate-limited); it never writes to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Performs no deletion, overwrite, or other irreversible action; every response is derived per-request from the input drawing.

justifications.read_only_justification: Rasterizes the drawing to a PNG in memory and returns it; no state is created or changed.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches the user-supplied http(s) DXF URL with guarded GET requests; it publishes nothing and posts nothing.
justifications.destructive_justification: Rendering is a pure read-and-transform; nothing is deleted, overwritten, or sent anywhere irreversible.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns a structured summary plus widget-only drawing data for the in-chat viewer; it reads the drawing and changes nothing.
justifications.open_world_justification: May fetch the user-supplied http(s) DXF URL with guarded GET requests; the viewer widget itself makes no network requests and writes nothing external.
justifications.destructive_justification: Opening the viewer has no side effects; the widget is locked to the delivered drawing and cannot alter or delete anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: App-only data channel: returns the drawing's bytes (whole or a byte range) to the viewer widget; it reads and returns data only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches the same user-supplied http(s) DXF URL under the same guards as the other tools; it never writes externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Serving bytes to the widget deletes and changes nothing.

test_cases.description: Structural questions about a drawing are answered from facts, not vision.
test_cases.user_prompt: What layers are in this drawing, and what size is it? https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jscad/sample-files/master/dxf/dxf-parser/floorplan.dxf
test_cases.expected_output: Lists the drawing's layers with their drawn colors, reports units and bounding-box size, and summarizes entity counts from the structured JSON facts.

test_cases.description: Text content (title blocks, dimension values) is read directly from the drawing.
test_cases.user_prompt: Read me the text and any dimension values in this DXF: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jscad/sample-files/master/dxf/dxf-parser/floorplan.dxf
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the drawing's TEXT/MTEXT strings, including text inside blocks and dimensions, without rendering or OCR.

test_cases.description: A static render is produced when the model needs to look at the drawing.
test_cases.user_prompt: Render this DXF as an image at width 800: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jscad/sample-files/master/dxf/dxf-parser/floorplan.dxf
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a PNG render of the drawing plus a direct image link the assistant can show if the chat UI hides MCP image blocks.

test_cases.description: Asking to see or explore a drawing opens the interactive in-chat viewer.
test_cases.user_prompt: Let me explore this floor plan interactively: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jscad/sample-files/master/dxf/dxf-parser/floorplan.dxf
test_cases.expected_output: The in-chat viewer widget opens with the drawing (pan, zoom, layer toggles, fullscreen); larger URL drawings are fetched by the widget itself, and the model narrates the viewer's reported status.

test_cases.description: Inline DXF text pasted into the conversation is inspected without any URL.
test_cases.user_prompt:
Here is a DXF I pasted as text — tell me what entities it contains. 0
SECTION
2
ENTITIES
0
LINE
8
WALLS
10
0
20
0
11
10
21
0
0
ENDSEC
0
EOF
test_cases.expected_output: Parses the pasted DXF text and reports its entities (one LINE on layer WALLS) with units and bounds.

negative_test_cases.description: Other CAD formats are out of scope; the app handles DXF only.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Convert this STEP file to STL for 3D printing.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked; it reads DXF drawings and does not convert other CAD formats.

negative_test_cases.description: Editing or modifying drawings is not supported; the app is view-only.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete the DIMENSIONS layer from my drawing file and save it back.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked to edit; all tools are read-only, and the assistant should explain that Aspicio inspects and displays drawings but does not modify them.

negative_test_cases.description: Nearby design requests without a DXF drawing should not trigger the app.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Design a floor plan for a two-bedroom apartment.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because there is no existing DXF to inspect, render, or view; drawing creation is outside its capabilities.
